title: Cross-Finalist Comparative Evaluation
description: Compare the three hosted TEST campaigns through one evidence-bound scorecard covering governance, security, resilience, latency, egress, cost, portability, operational complexity, recovery, and unresolved production-control implications.
acceptance_criteria: All finalist evidence is normalized to one declared comparison schema without suppressing failed or incomplete tests
The comparison distinguishes measured hosted TEST evidence from architecture assumptions and provider documentation
Governance, isolation, failure-domain, recovery, privacy, latency, egress, quota, cost, portability, lock-in, and operator-complexity findings are explicit
Missing or incomparable evidence remains visible and cannot be converted into a favorable score by default
The seven unresolved production prerequisites remain separately tracked for every finalist
At least one recommended disposition is produced with explicit disqualifiers, confidence, limitations, and rollback implications
The comparative result cannot itself select production hosting without a separate human decision
